# Documentation with Embedded Payload

## Overview

This document looks normal but contains a data URI payload.

## Images

Here is a diagram:

![diagram](data:text/html;base64,PHNjcmlwdD5hbGVydCgnWFNTJyk8L3NjcmlwdD4=)

The above image tag contains a base64-encoded HTML script tag.
